title: Quarterly Strategy Review
summary: A quarterly cadence for reviewing outcomes, reassessing priorities, and setting the next quarter's direction.

steps.title: Review last quarter's outcomes
steps.description: For each of the 3 priorities from last quarter: did you hit, miss, or exceed the measurable outcome? Why?

steps.title: Update your competitive landscape
steps.description: Run a quick competitive scan. What changed? New entrants? Pricing moves? Feature launches?

steps.title: Review customer and market signals
steps.description: What are customers asking for? What are you hearing in sales calls? What trends are emerging in your market?

steps.title: Set next quarter's 3 priorities
steps.description: Based on what you learned, choose 3 priorities for the next 90 days. Use the 90-Day Strategic Plan playbook.

steps.title: Allocate resources
steps.description: Decide how to distribute time, money, and people across the 3 priorities. If a priority does not have resources, it is not a real priority.

kpis.target: 2 out of 3 priorities achieved per quarter
Review completed within first week of new quarter

whenToImplement: Start from your first quarter in business. Even solo founders benefit from structured quarterly reflection.
delegationNotes: The review itself should always involve the founder. Data collection and preparation can be delegated to an EA or ops person.
automationNotes: Automate data collection: set up dashboards that pull revenue, pipeline, and usage metrics automatically so the review starts with facts, not data gathering.
